overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the character walking through a modern city at night. The scene features autumn foliage, illuminated skyscrapers, urban pedestrians, and transitions from sidewalks to plazas and street crossings.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk between modern office towers

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: man in gray hoodie carrying shopping bag walking past Spider-Man

entered.detail: tall illuminated office tower with grid of windows dominating the left side
tall illuminated office tower with glass facade on the right
tree with bright yellow-orange autumn foliage lit by street lamp
dark blue pickup truck parked at the curb
wide stone staircase with metal railings leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a concrete sidewalk between two modern glass skyscrapers at night. The street is lined with parked cars and autumn trees with yellow foliage. A few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and autumn trees

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete sidewalk to stone plaza tiles as Spider-Man enters open plaza area
Spider-Man crosses asphalt street with bus stop marking visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing groups of pedestrians, then crossing a street with a bus stop

notable_agents.action: group of three men standing and conversing on the plaza
man in business suit walking across the street

entered.detail: large rectangular stone bench in the plaza
red box truck with 'TOTAL SHIPPING' text parked on the street
asphalt road with yellow 'BUS STOP' painted marking

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider urban plaza with stone tile paving and scattered benches. Spider-Man walks past groups of pedestrians and autumn trees before crossing a street where a red delivery truck is parked. The environment transitions from enclosed sidewalk to open public space.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban park walkway with benches

events.description: entering densely treed section of the plaza with overhead canopy blocking the sky

agents.ego_description: strolling through the park area passing pedestrians and benches under tree canopy

notable_agents.action: woman in purple coat walking with a small dog on a leash
man in black suit standing with hands in pockets

entered.detail: large circular concrete planter with trees growing from it
stone bench with people sitting on it

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through a densely vegetated section of the urban park where trees form a canopy overhead. The path is lined with circular stone planters and benches. Pedestrians stroll in opposing directions, including a woman walking her dog, as the character moves through the sheltered green space.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with traffic lights and crosswalks

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights and waiting vehicles
crossing the street at marked crosswalk with traffic light visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection, turning left, and crossing the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the street past the intersection
man in black jacket raising his hand in a waving gesture

entered.detail: lower-rise red brick building with illuminated windows and ground floor shops
traffic signal on pole showing red light
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man approaches a city intersection with traffic lights and a brick apartment building on the left. The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk while a white sedan drives past. A pedestrian waves from the sidewalk as the scene opens up to the intersection corner with tall buildings in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a modern city at night, transitioning from a narrow skyscraper corridor into an open urban park and finally toward a busy street intersection. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a concrete sidewalk flanked by glass towers and yellow autumn foliage, moving past parked cars and oncoming pedestrians. As the path opens, the scene expands into a wide stone plaza with scattered benches and a parked red delivery truck before shifting into a sheltered green space where a canopy of trees and circular stone planters line the way. The camera then follows the character past strolling pedestrians and a woman walking her dog, eventually emerging from the vegetation toward a brick apartment building. The movement concludes as Spider-Man crosses a marked crosswalk under city traffic lights, passing a white sedan while the view opens up to a corner framed by towering skyscrapers.
